  • Send data from SAP Analytics Cloud to 3rd Party tools using CPI
  • Integrating SAP Business Data Cloud - S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • What exactly is SAP BW PCE… and what it is not !
  • Understanding ABAP Pipeline Engine used for Data Integration in Datasphere
  • Deep Dive into SAP BDC Data products
  • Unlocking Data Potential: What I Learned from SAP Sapphire
  • Provisioning of Business Data Cloud: Installation of Intelligent Applications and Data Packages
  • SAP Master Data Governance - Roadmap Session at SAP Sapphire 2025
  • Session 2 Recap & Highlights– Unleash your Data and AI with Irfan Khan and Timo Elliott
  • Session 1 Recap & Highlights– Data Inspired – Successful concepts for data-driven organizations
  • My SAP Sapphire Orlando experience
  • Health Monitoring in SAP Datasphere
  • Provisioning of Business Data Cloud : SAP Databricks
  • Provisioning of Business Data Cloud : SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Developer News June 5th, 2025
  • Provisioning of Business Data Cloud : SAP Datasphere
  • Introductory Guide to Provisioning of SAP Business Data Cloud
  • Configuration of Cloud Transport Management Service (CTMS) on SAP BTP for SAP Datasphere Tenants
  • Consuming data from SAP Datasphere in SAP BTP CAP Applications
  • ARIBA API data extraction & reporting with SAP BTP
  • SAP Takes Center Stage as Visionary Sponsor at the Databricks Summit

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 30: Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
In this episode, the focus is on SAP's Cloud Identity Authentication Service, which facilitates secure connections for various SAP cloud solutions. Each cloud solution is treated as an application, enabling solution-specific configurations. By connecting to a corporate identity provider, it allows single sign-on (SSO) across multiple applications and users. The service can manage multiple identity providers, ensuring seamless integration. Conditional authentication can be implemented for different types of users, allowing internal and external users to access systems with the appropriate authentication methods.

Takeaways

  • Cloud Identity Authentication Service connects various SAP cloud solutions as applications.
  • Each connected SAP cloud solution, such as SAP SuccessFactors, can be configured individually within the Cloud Identity service.
  • Corporate identity providers can be integrated with Cloud Identity for single sign-on (SSO) functionality across connected cloud solutions.
  • One Identity Authentication Service (IAS) can manage multiple applications and identity providers for easier system management.
  • Each SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) subaccount is treated as a distinct application in Cloud Identity Authentication Service.
  • Services like Work Zone and Build Apps are registered as separate applications in the Cloud Identity service.
  • Connecting all cloud solutions through the same identity authentication service ensures seamless integration and avoids authentication issues.
  • Applications such as SuccessFactors and Work Zone can integrate with each other without authentication problems by sharing the same token.
  • Conditional authentication can be set up for different user types, such as internal and external users, allowing flexibility in authentication methods.
  • By connecting a corporate identity provider to Cloud Identity, it can be reused for all connected SAP cloud solutions, simplifying the setup.

entry.title: Collaborate on the Next Evolution of SAP BTP: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative 2025-2
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) is transforming how enterprises innovate. As a unified platform that brings together application development, automation, data and analytics, integration, and AI, SAP BTP enables businesses to unlock new levels of efficiency and intelligence - all while maximizing the value of their SAP investments.

Now, imagine being part of that transformation.

The second cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for 2025 has just launched and it’s your chance to influence the future of SAP BTP. As a customer or partner, you’re invited to directly engage with SAP developers and product teams to help shape upcoming features, tools, and innovations.

This is more than just early insights - it’s a chance to influence the future of enterprise technology.

But don’t wait - registration is open only until July 25, 2025.

You can sign up to collaborate on one or more of the following active projects:

  • Apply your brand to SAP applications using the UI theme designer
  • Automation and AI in SAP Discovery Center
  • Building BTP Solutions effectively with AI-augmented Infrastructure as Code Generation
  • Enhancing the User Experience of SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
  • Flexible Cost Allocations using SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Universal Model
  • IT Financial Management Cost Allocation Module in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud
  • Logging Feedback Day - SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime
  • Making your business future ready for Agentic AI - reimagining application development on BTP
  • Operational Transfer Pricing Optimization in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud
  • SAP Build - Discovery Initiative
  • Strategic Planning Scenarios in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Universal Model
  • The Future of Autonomous Software Engineering (ASE) in the Enterprise Context
  • Using a Custom Theme Across SAP Platforms and Systems

Let’s shape the future together!

Innovation happens through collaboration. By participating in the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects, you help SAP create better, more relevant solutions for businesses like yours. This is your chance to influence what comes next.

Don’t miss out – sign up today at influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2 in 2025!

Warm regards, 
Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team 

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.
